scripts.lint: pnpm --dir packages/config lint && pnpm --dir packages/contracts lint && pnpm --dir apps/web lint && pnpm --dir apps/api lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir packages/config typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/contracts typecheck && pnpm --dir apps/web typecheck && pnpm --dir apps/api typecheck
scripts.compose:logs:db: docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.yml logs -f postgres redis nginx
scripts.compose:restart: docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.yml up --build -d
